Es bastante desgarrador escuchar lo que está pasando con la gente de Levski por este brote de Molina Mold, ¿verdad? Nuestra familia ha decidido hacer todo lo posible para ayudar a Alliance Aid. Tenemos una carga a escala media de antifúngico esperando ser recogida en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y llevada a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. ¿Crees que puedes encargarte de esto por nosotros?

Antes de ir, asegúrate de llevar una nave que pueda transportar <EM4>[MAX_SCU] contenedores de carga</EM4>. También necesitarás un <EM4>rayo tractor portátil</EM4> para encargarte de los contenedores. 
 

Buen transporte,  
Reyes Ling 
Coordinador de logística de carga
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling sabe que este es un universo peligroso e impredecible y ha establecido varios protocolos para proteger tanto a ti como a la carga de nuestro cliente. Para asegurarnos de que no se te penalice por circunstancias fuera de tu control, el pago total se prorrateará según el porcentaje de carga entregada con éxito. Se establecerá un temporizador de entrega para cada transporte. Cualquier carga que permanezca sin entregar al expirar será marcada como robada y tratada como tal. Todas las recogidas y entregas deben hacerse mediante carga automática o en un elevador de carga.

CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MoldTreatment_des.en:
Hi,

We’ve joined the effort to help those affected by the Molina mold outbreak. There’s a small scale haul of urgently needed treatment waiting to be picked up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Any chance you’re available?  
   
All you’ll need is a ship that can fit <EM4>1 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to make moving the stuff easier on you. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
CleanAir_Hauling_Small_MoldTreatment_des.tr:
Hola,

Nos hemos unido al esfuerzo para ayudar a los afectados por el brote de Molina Mold. Hay un pequeño transporte del tratamiento urgentemente necesario esperando ser recogido en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y entregado en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. ¿Hay alguna posibilidad de que estés disponible?  
   
Todo lo que necesitarás es una nave que pueda transportar <EM4>[MAX_SCU] contenedores de carga</EM4> y un <EM4>rayo tractor portátil</EM4> para que moverlo todo te resulte más fácil. 
 

Buen transporte,  
Reyes Ling 
Coordinador de logística de carga
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling sabe que este es un universo peligroso e impredecible y ha establecido varios protocolos para proteger tanto a ti como a la carga de nuestro cliente. Para asegurarnos de que no se te penalice por circunstancias fuera de tu control, el pago total se prorrateará según el porcentaje de carga entregada con éxito. Se establecerá un temporizador de entrega para cada transporte. Cualquier carga que permanezca sin entregar al expirar será marcada como robada y tratada como tal. Todas las recogidas y entregas deben hacerse mediante carga automática o en un elevador de carga.

CleanAir_Defense-Milestone1_desc.en:
Since you've been doing so much work helping out the Defense Division I wanted to come to you with this contract direct. It's a bit of a delicate one. Two VIPs fell ill and the worry was that if word got out they were being transported they would become major targets.

Unfortunately, it seems that's exactly what happened. Our attempts to smuggle them from Nyx to Stanton for medical treatment have failed, and now the ship carrying them is under attack. 

We need you to hurry to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, neutralize the attackers and ensure that the cryopods make it safely to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

In fact, I want you to make sure you have a ship that can carry the cryopods just in case their original transport is too damaged to go on.

I sincerely hope you manage to pull this rescue mission off. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CleanAir_Defense-Milestone1_desc.tr:
Como has estado trabajando tanto ayudando a la División de Defensa, quería ofrecerte este contrato directamente. Es un asunto algo delicado. Dos VIP enfermaron y existía la preocupación de que, si se sabía que estaban siendo transportados, se convertirían en objetivos prioritarios.

Por desgracia, parece que eso es exactamente lo que ocurrió. Nuestros intentos de sacarlos clandestinamente de Nyx a Stanton para recibir tratamiento médico han fracasado y ahora la nave que los transporta está siendo atacada. 

Necesitamos que te apresures a llegar a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, neutralices a los atacantes y te asegures de que las cápsulas criogénicas lleguen sanas y salvas al elevador de carga en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

De hecho, quiero que te asegures de tener una nave capaz de transportar las cápsulas criogénicas por si su transporte original está demasiado dañado para continuar.

Sinceramente espero que consigas llevar a cabo con éxito esta misión de rescate. 

Lima Endicott
Operador principal
Citizens for Prosperity

CleanAir_Courier_Derelict_desc.en:
ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 

PICKUP LOCATION – An FTL ship carrying a delivery for Alliance Aid has not completed it's contract. The last known location has it still over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. A courier needed to retrieve package and continue delivery.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package must be taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – It is unclear what happened to the ship, but we expect a malfunction. Still, caution is advised. <EM4>Low level engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL –  All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

FTL Courier Services is proud to be assisting in Alliance Aid efforts to help fight the Levski outbreak.
CleanAir_Courier_Derelict_desc.tr:
ATENCIÓN A TODOS LOS MENSAJEROS DE FTL
ASIGNACIÓN INMEDIATA

**DETALLES DEL CONTRATO** 

LUGAR DE RECOGIDA – Una nave de FTL que transportaba una entrega para Alliance Aid no ha completado su contrato. La última ubicación conocida la sitúa todavía en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Se necesita mensajero para recuperar el paquete y continuar la entrega.

LUGAR DE ENTREGA – El paquete debe llevarse a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

NIVEL DE AMENAZA – No está claro qué le ocurrió a la nave, pero esperamos un fallo. Aun así, se recomienda precaución. Se esperan <EM4>enfrentamientos de bajo nivel</EM4>.

TRANSPORTE – Todas las necesidades de transporte deberán ser organizadas por el mensajero. 

FTL Courier Services se enorgullece de colaborar en los esfuerzos de Alliance Aid para ayudar a combatir el brote de Levski.

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_M_desc_001.en:
One of our Clips put out a kill order on a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Feel like making ‘em happy by taking it out?

Here’s what you need to know. The target and their escort are scheduled to pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Looks like there’s an emission cloud nearby that can hide your ship’s sig. Wait there until you’re ready to strike. 

The Clip only cares about wiping out the target. Anything of value you find floating in the wreckage is all yours. 

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>5</EM4> Council Scrip to sweeten the pot. 

- Stows
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_M_desc_001.tr:
Uno de nuestros Clips ha emitido una orden de eliminación sobre un <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. ¿Te interesa hacerlos felices eliminándolo?

Esto es lo que necesitas saber. El objetivo y su escolta están programados para pasar cerca de <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Parece que hay una nube de emisión cerca que puede ocultar la señal de tu nave. Quédate allí hasta que estés listo para atacar. 

El Clip solo se preocupa por eliminar al objetivo. Todo lo que encuentres flotando entre los restos será tuyo. 

Y además de eso, le daré al contratista principal un bono de <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]</EM4> Council Scrip para endulzar la oferta. 

- Stows

vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_rehire.en:
It is not often in life that we get another chance to make a first impression, but I am going to provide to you with just that.

To say I was disappointed in how things last transpired on your last assassination attempt would be a severe understatement. However, here is your chance to prove yourself capable of more. 

Kill [TARGET] over at [LOCATION] and I will consider the slate wiped clean. 

Sincerely,
Vaughn
vaughn_assassination_VE_desc_rehire.tr:
No es frecuente en la vida que tengamos otra oportunidad de causar una primera impresión, pero voy a proporcionarte exactamente eso.

Decir que me decepcionó cómo ocurrieron las cosas en tu último intento de asesinato sería una subestimación severa. Sin embargo, aquí tienes la oportunidad de demostrar que eres capaz de más. 

Mata a [TARGET] en [LOCATION] y haré borrón y cuenta nueva. 

Sinceramente,
Vaughn

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SandArmour.en:
Hello, know many humans want saldynium for regen problem. Credits good, yes, but Wikelo can use that, kopion horn, and other things to make special armor. 

Once done, you be very tough. Very scary.

You see items needed. Bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and I make for you.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SandArmour.tr:
Hola, sé que muchos humanos quieren saldynium para el problema de regeneración. Los créditos son buenos, sí, pero Wikelo puede usar eso, cuerno de kopion y otras cosas para hacer armadura especial. 

Cuando esté terminada, serás muy resistente. Muy aterrador.

Ves los objetos necesarios. Tráelos a <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> y lo haré para ti.

Adiós.

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SpikeyArmor.en:
Vanduul have strange ways. I never talk to them, old souli used to, but not Wikelo. Anyway, though not friendly, they make interesting thing. If you like, Wikelo can make you look more like.

Bring things. Will do.

Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SpikeyArmor.tr:
Los Vanduul tienen formas extrañas. Nunca hablé con ellos, viejo souli sí, pero Wikelo no. De todos modos, aunque no son amistosos, hacen cosas interesantes. Si quieres, Wikelo puede hacer que te parezcas más a ellos.

Trae cosas. Lo haré.

Adiós.

TheCollector_Ships_Anvil_Asgard_Desc.en: Wikelo mod Asgard and so that it fights more. You in a fight, this mod is what you want. Plus, good deal on the trade. Just bring items here and I give you the ship.
TheCollector_Ships_Anvil_Asgard_Desc.tr: Wikelo modifica la Asgard para que luche más. Si estás en un combate, este mod es lo que quieres. Además, buen trato en el trueque. Solo trae los artículos aquí y te doy la nave.

cfp_defendship_MRT_bombingrun_desc_001.en:
One of our people is currently under attack at [LOCATION]. They have attempted to elude their attackers to get to safely, but the outlaws have proven too skilled for them to break away. 

We need you to fly there, engage with the attackers, and then destroy the nearby fuel reserves. The hope is that this display of destruction will dissuade them from continuing pursuit.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_MRT_bombingrun_desc_001.tr:
Una de nuestras personas está siendo atacada en [LOCATION]. Han intentado evadir a sus atacantes para ponerse a salvo, pero los forajidos han demostrado ser demasiado hábiles para que logren escapar.

Necesitamos que vueles allí, enfrentes a los atacantes y destruyas los depósitos de combustible cercanos. La esperanza es que esta demostración de destrucción los disuada de continuar la persecución.

Lima Endicott
Operador principal
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_defend_cave_Generic_desc_001.en:
We received a distress call from [LOCATION] saying that they're being robbed by a small group of outlaws. [LOCATION] Though remote, this outpost is a crucial piece of CFP's infrastructure in the area so we need to take it back.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_cave_Generic_desc_001.tr:
Recibimos una llamada de auxilio desde [LOCATION] informando que están siendo asaltados por un pequeño grupo de forajidos. [LOCATION] Aunque remoto, este puesto de avanzada es una pieza crucial de la infraestructura de CFP en la zona, por lo que necesitamos recuperarlo.

Lima Endicott
Operador principal
Citizens for Prosperity

TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad3_Desc.en: Wikelo give deep red and green colors to make ATLS legs look like they cooling from heat. Very pretty.
TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad3_Desc.tr: Wikelo puso colores rojo intenso y verde para que las piernas del ATLS parezcan enfriarse del calor. Muy bonito.

TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad2_Desc.en: Many Human work place have orange color there. Must mean work to you. This suit does work. Make sense.
TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad2_Desc.tr: Muchos lugares de trabajo humanos tienen color naranja. Debe significar trabajo para ustedes. Este traje trabaja. Tiene sentido.

TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad1_Desc.en: Wikelo travel to one Human planet and find very cold, but very pretty. This remind of that.
TheCollector_Mod_ATLS_Geo_Grad1_Desc.tr: Wikelo viajó a un planeta humano y lo encontró muy frío, pero muy bonito. Esto le recuerda a ese lugar.

cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_Gen_E_desc_001.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available combat operators to [LOCATION]. A group of outlaws have launched an unprovoked attack and our security personnel are desperately in need of support.

Please dispatch to [LOCATION] with all urgency and good luck.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_Gen_E_desc_001.tr:
Citizens for Prosperity está buscando operadores de combate disponibles para [LOCATION]. Un grupo de forajidos ha lanzado un ataque no provocado y nuestro personal de seguridad necesita desesperadamente apoyo.

Por favor, diríjanse a [LOCATION] con toda urgencia y buena suerte.

Lima Endicott
Operador principal
Citizens for Prosperity

headhunters_defend_xt_desc_001.en:
Those XenoThreat punks launched an attack against [LOCATION] so we're looking for people to go fend them off. 

Get out there and waste every XenoThreat you see.

Stows out.
headhunters_defend_xt_desc_001.tr:
Esos punks de XenoThreat lanzaron un ataque contra [LOCATION], así que necesitamos a gente para ir a defenderlo.

Ve y elimina a cada XenoThreat que veas.

-Stows out.

headhunters_defendship_MRT_PA_desc_001.en: Some People’s Alliance members with a death wish decided to target one of our ships. Need someone to hustle over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show ‘em what happens when you mess with the Headhunters.\n\nStows out.
headhunters_defendship_MRT_PA_desc_001.tr: Algunos miembros de la People’s Alliance con instinto suicida decidieron atacar una de nuestras naves. Necesito a alguien que se dirija rápido a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y les muestre lo que pasa cuando te metes con los Headhunters.\n\nStows fuera.

blackbox_recover_desc_S_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR547384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
This request comes down from Head Office. 

We’ve just learned that a recent ship attack near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> might have been the work of a notorious and equally elusive outlaw ringleader. The last time they popped their head above water was years ago, so this is a rare opportunity to catch them. This is an opportunity that our client does not want to pass up. We need a <EM4>top-tier operative</EM4> with elite combat experience to retrieve the blackbox of this downed ship in order to prove the ringleader’s involvement.

<EM4>There will be highly-trained hostiles present on the scene</EM4> who will put up significant resistance to your presence. Eliminate them and complete the mission.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Immediately scramble to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and clear the surrounding airspace in order to secure the blackbox. Once obtained, deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Head Office stresses that this will be an incredibly difficult mission to pull off. Make sure you bring your A-game.
blackbox_recover_desc_S_001.tr:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR547384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
This request comes down from Head Office. 

We’ve just learned that a recent ship attack near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> might have been the work of a notorious and equally elusive outlaw ringleader. The last time they popped their head above water was years ago, so this is a rare opportunity to catch them. This is an opportunity that our client does not want to pass up. We need a <EM4>top-tier operative</EM4> with elite combat experience to retrieve the blackbox of this downed ship in order to prove the ringleader’s involvement.

<EM4>There will be highly-trained hostiles present on the scene</EM4> who will put up significant resistance to your presence. Eliminate them and complete the mission.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Immediately scramble to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and clear the surrounding airspace in order to secure the blackbox. Once obtained, deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Head Office stresses that this will be an incredibly difficult mission to pull off. Make sure you bring your A-game.

BitZeros_blackbox_S_Desc_001.en:
Got a big job for a big player. We’re in the process of making someone disappear, like completely vanish, and a part of that is recovering the blackbox from the “accident” that they had recently over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.
Only problem is, seems the people this person hired to stage the accident have gotten it in their heads that there’s more money to be made. So much so that they’re still keeping tabs on the now deceased’s ship.
These guys aren’t playing around either. You’ll need a couple of friends to help you do this. But if you can get the blackbox out of there and into our hands by dropping it at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, we can really make it worth your while.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_S_Desc_001.tr:
Tenemos un gran trabajo para alguien de tu calibre. Estamos en proceso de hacer que alguien desaparezca por completo, y parte de eso implica recuperar la caja negra del “accidente” que tuvieron recientemente en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

El problema es que la gente que contrataron para montar el accidente cree que puede sacar más dinero del asunto. Tanto que siguen vigilando la nave de la ahora difunta persona.

Estos tipos no se lo toman a broma. Necesitarás algunos amigos para ayudarte. Pero si logras sacar la caja negra de allí y entregarla en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, podemos hacer que te resulte muy rentable.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_S_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR547384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
This request comes down from Head Office. 

We’ve just learned that a recent ship attack near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> might have been the work of a notorious and equally elusive outlaw ringleader. The last time they popped their head above water was years ago, so this is a rare opportunity to catch them. This is an opportunity that our client does not want to pass up. We need a <EM4>top-tier operative</EM4> with elite combat experience to retrieve the blackbox of this downed ship in order to prove the ringleader’s involvement.

<EM4>There will be highly-trained hostiles present on the scene</EM4> who will put up significant resistance to your presence. Eliminate them and complete the mission.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Immediately scramble to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and clear the surrounding airspace in order to secure the blackbox. Once obtained, deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Head Office stresses that this will be an incredibly difficult mission to pull off. Make sure you bring your A-game.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_S_Desc_001.tr:
Agencia Hockrow 
Caso #BR547384
Investigador principal: Arken Mallor

Resumen del caso: 
Esta solicitud viene directamente de la Oficina Central. 

Acabamos de saber que un ataque reciente a una nave cerca de <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> podría haber sido obra de un cabecilla forajido tan notorio como escurridizo. La última vez que apareció fue hace años, así que esta es una oportunidad poco común para atraparlo. Nuestro cliente no quiere dejarla pasar. Necesitamos un <EM4>operativo de máximo nivel</EM4> con experiencia élite en combate para recuperar la caja negra de esta nave derribada y demostrar la implicación del cabecilla.

<EM4>Habrá hostiles altamente entrenados en la zona</EM4> que ofrecerán una resistencia significativa a tu presencia. Elimínalos y completa la misión.

Acciones del investigador contratado:
Desplázate inmediatamente a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y despeja el espacio circundante para asegurar la caja negra. Una vez recuperada, entrégala en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Notas adicionales:
La Oficina Central recalca que esta será una misión extremadamente difícil. Asegúrate de dar lo mejor de ti.

blackbox_recover_desc_M_001.en:
We were a little too smart with this one and it’s kinda backfired. Sometimes you gotta dream big, you know? Anyway. we were looking to move some encrypted data to one of our data havens and decided to hide it in a ship’s blackbox. They filled the ship with “valuable” stuff as a decoy in case it got attacked. The plan worked a little too well and the cargo might have attracted the wrong kind of attention. They stole all the cargo but missed the blackbox. Bad news is the ship is now swarming with outlaws.

The data on that blackbox is useless to them, but we need it. If you can get it back for us, we can give you a nice cut from what we make. Seems like a fair deal, right?

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and after you’ve done your thing take the flight recorder to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros
blackbox_recover_desc_M_001.tr:
We were a little too smart with this one and it’s kinda backfired. Sometimes you gotta dream big, you know? Anyway. we were looking to move some encrypted data to one of our data havens and decided to hide it in a ship’s blackbox. They filled the ship with “valuable” stuff as a decoy in case it got attacked. The plan worked a little too well and the cargo might have attracted the wrong kind of attention. They stole all the cargo but missed the blackbox. Bad news is the ship is now swarming with outlaws.

The data on that blackbox is useless to them, but we need it. If you can get it back for us, we can give you a nice cut from what we make. Seems like a fair deal, right?

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and after you’ve done your thing take the flight recorder to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_M_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR74382
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A known outlaw attacked and destroyed a ship near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The agency has been contracted to retrieve the ship’s blackbox in order to build a case against them and lobby for Advocacy intervention. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
An operative is needed to head to the crime scene at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the area from any hostiles present to procure the blackbox, and deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be advised that there are still <EM4>hostile forces in the area</EM4> that will attack. These will most likely have some experience fighting, so be prepared. 

This contract has been flagged as a <EM4>combat mission</EM4>.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_M_Desc_001.tr:
Agencia Hockrow 
Caso #BR74382
Investigador principal: Arken Mallor

Resumen del caso: 
Un forajido conocido atacó y destruyó una nave cerca de <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. La agencia ha sido contratada para recuperar la caja negra de la nave con el fin de construir un caso contra él y solicitar la intervención de la Advocacy. 

Acciones del investigador contratado:
Se necesita un operativo que se dirija a la escena del crimen en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, asegure la zona de cualquier hostil presente para obtener la caja negra y la entregue en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Notas adicionales:
Ten en cuenta que aún hay <EM4>fuerzas hostiles en la zona</EM4> que atacarán. Lo más probable es que tengan experiencia de combate, así que prepárate. 

Este contrato ha sido marcado como una <EM4>misión de combate</EM4>.

BitZeros_blackbox_M_Desc_001.en:
We were a little too smart with this one and it’s kinda backfired. Sometimes you gotta dream big, you know? Anyway. we were looking to move some encrypted data to one of our data havens and decided to hide it in a ship’s blackbox. They filled the ship with “valuable” stuff as a decoy in case it got attacked. The plan worked a little too well and the cargo might have attracted the wrong kind of attention. They stole all the cargo but missed the blackbox. Bad news is the ship is now swarming with outlaws.

The data on that blackbox is useless to them, but we need it. If you can get it back for us, we can give you a nice cut from what we make. Seems like a fair deal, right?

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and after you’ve done your thing take the flight recorder to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_M_Desc_001.tr:
Se nos fue un poco la mano con este plan y ahora nos está explotando en la cara. A veces hay que soñar a lo grande, ¿sabes? En fin… queríamos mover unos datos cifrados a uno de nuestros refugios de datos y decidimos esconderlos en la caja negra de una nave. Llenaron la nave de cosas “valiosas” como señuelo en caso de ataque. Funcionó demasiado bien y la carga atrajo la atención equivocada. Robaron todo… menos la caja negra. Lo malo es que ahora la nave está plagada de forajidos.

Los datos de esa caja negra no les sirven, pero a nosotros sí. Si puedes recuperarla, te daremos una buena parte de lo que ganemos. Suena justo, ¿no?

Ve a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y, cuando termines, entrega la caja negra en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

blackbox_recover_desc_E_001.en:
So we were expecting a pretty important package earlier today but turns out the pilot got ghosted and they ripped the tracking chip from it and got away. Pretty clever right? Not really, because they forgot to take the flight recorder too.

Get the blackbox from the wreck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We’ll send you the creds when you’re done.

Oh and watch out for scavs, people are pretty desperate these days, even if it just some busted courier ship.

-Bit Zeros
blackbox_recover_desc_E_001.tr:
So we were expecting a pretty important package earlier today but turns out the pilot got ghosted and they ripped the tracking chip from it and got away. Pretty clever right? Not really, because they forgot to take the flight recorder too.

Get the blackbox from the wreck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We’ll send you the creds when you’re done.

Oh and watch out for scavs, people are pretty desperate these days, even if it just some busted courier ship.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_E_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR83215
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Client hired the agency to look into the destruction of one of their ships near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They are claiming that the ship was destroyed by an ex-partner and need the blackbox to prove it.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Dispatch to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate the derelict ship. Secure the area from any hostiles. Retrieve the blackbox and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Whoever destroyed the ship could still be in the area so be prepared for a fight, as such this has been flagged as a <EM4>combat mission</EM4>.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_E_Desc_001.tr:
Agencia Hockrow 
Caso #BR83215
Investigador principal: Arken Mallor

Resumen del caso: 
El cliente contrató a la agencia para investigar la destrucción de una de sus naves cerca de <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Afirman que la nave fue destruida por una expareja y necesitan la caja negra para demostrarlo.

Acciones del investigador contratado:
Desplazarse a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y localizar la nave abandonada. Asegurar la zona de cualquier hostil. Recuperar la caja negra y entregarla en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Notas adicionales:
Quien destruyó la nave podría seguir en la zona, así que prepárate para un combate; por ello se ha marcado como una <EM4>misión de combate</EM4>.

BitZeros_blackbox_E_Desc_001.en:
So we were expecting a pretty important package earlier today but turns out the pilot got ghosted and they ripped the tracking chip from it and got away. Pretty clever right? Not really, because they forgot to take the flight recorder too.

Get the blackbox from the wreck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We’ll send you the creds when you’re done.

Oh and watch out for scavs, people are pretty desperate these days, even if it just some busted courier ship.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_E_Desc_001.tr:
Así que estábamos esperando un paquete bastante importante hoy, pero resulta que al piloto lo despistaron, arrancaron el chip de rastreo y se largaron. ¿Ingenioso, verdad? Pues no tanto, porque olvidaron llevarse también la caja negra.

Recoge la caja negra de los restos en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y llévala a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Te enviaremos los créditos cuando termines.

Ah, y cuidado con los carroñeros; la gente está bastante desesperada últimamente, aunque solo sea una nave mensajera destrozada.

-Bit Zeros

blackbox_recover_desc_VH_001.en:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros
blackbox_recover_desc_VH_001.tr:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VH_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR23665
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Operative with <EM4>extensive combat experience</EM4> needed to retrieve a <EM4>blackbox</EM4> from a compromised ship at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Client hasn’t specified why they need it but are paying good money to have it back. 

Analysis of the wreck indicates that there are some serious hostiles in the area, so any attempt to retrieve will likely require a fight. Our records indicate that these hostiles are highly trained and aggressive, so prepare accordingly.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Route to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and secure the blacbox by any means necessary. Once obtained, deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for payment.

Additional Notes:
Operations wanted to reiterate that this will be a <EM4>heavy combat mission</EM4> so make sure you bring allies or equipment to handle it.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VH_Desc_001.tr:
Agencia Hockrow 
Caso #BR23665
Investigador principal: Arken Mallor

Resumen del caso: 
Se necesita un operativo con <EM4>amplia experiencia en combate</EM4> para recuperar una <EM4>caja negra</EM4> de una nave comprometida en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. El cliente no ha especificado por qué la necesita, pero está pagando bien para recuperarla. 

El análisis de los restos indica que hay hostiles serios en la zona, por lo que cualquier intento de recuperación probablemente requerirá combate. Nuestros registros indican que estos hostiles están altamente entrenados y son agresivos, así que prepárate en consecuencia.

Acciones del investigador contratado:
Dirígete a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y asegura la caja negra por cualquier medio necesario. Una vez recuperada, entrégala en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> para recibir el pago.

Notas adicionales:
Operaciones quiere reiterar que esta será una <EM4>misión de combate pesado</EM4>, así que asegúrate de llevar aliados o el equipo adecuado para afrontarla.

BitZeros_blackbox_VH_Desc_001.en:
I’m not gonna give you the whole backstory of what this person has done to us, but all you need to know is that some scumbag is trying to get a payout for a ship crash and the insurance company wants to see the blackbox recording to make sure everything is “above board”.

We’re not gonna let that happen though.

Snatch that blackbox at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bring it to us instead so we can do some “creative editing” on the recording.

Apparently, this area is a bit of a hot zone. Probably why they staged the accident there. You should probably bring some backup so you don’t get ghosted before you can bring the blackbox to us at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_VH_Desc_001.tr:
No voy a contarte toda la historia de lo que esta persona nos hizo, pero basta con saber que cierto desgraciado intenta cobrar un seguro por un accidente que él mismo provocó, y la aseguradora quiere ver la grabación de la caja negra para confirmar que todo está “en regla”.

Nosotros no vamos a permitirlo.

Recupera la caja negra en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y tráenosla para poder hacer un poco de “edición creativa” de la grabación.

Por lo visto, esa zona es un hervidero. Probablemente por eso montaron allí el accidente. Será mejor que lleves apoyo para que no te “fantasmeen” antes de entregarnos la caja negra en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

-Bit Zeros

blackbox_recover_desc_VE_001.en:
Someone of interest to us recently kicked the bucket (not our fault) over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we’re pretty curious what happened. We need you to grab the blackbox from the ship and drop it off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This is a shipwreck by the way, so chances are some scavs will be around there too. But don’t worry, that’s been factored into your pay too.

-Bit Zeros
blackbox_recover_desc_VE_001.tr:
Someone of interest to us recently kicked the bucket (not our fault) over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we’re pretty curious what happened. We need you to grab the blackbox from the ship and drop it off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This is a shipwreck by the way, so chances are some scavs will be around there too. But don’t worry, that’s been factored into your pay too.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VE_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR56263
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to extract the blackbox from a destroyed ship. The ship’s owner claims that it was genuinely lost in an outlaw attack, but the insurance company has doubts. We’ve been hired to find out which is true.

I suspect that the perpetrators are long gone by now, so you shouldn't run into any resistance.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Proceed to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the black box in the derelict spaceship there and return it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
You will need to EVA for this one so make sure you got a suit.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_VE_Desc_001.tr:
Agencia Hockrow 
Caso #BR56263
Investigador principal: Arken Mallor

Resumen del caso: 
Se necesita un operativo para extraer la caja negra de una nave destruida. El propietario afirma que realmente fue pérdida en un ataque de forajidos, pero la aseguradora tiene dudas. Nos han contratado para averiguar la verdad.

Sospecho que los perpetradores ya se han marchado, así que no deberías encontrar resistencia.

Acciones del investigador contratado:
Procede a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, asegura la caja negra de la nave abandonada allí y devuélvela a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Notas adicionales:
Tendrás que hacer EVA para esta misión, así que asegúrate de llevar traje.

BitZeros_blackbox_VE_Desc_001.en:
Someone of interest to us recently kicked the bucket (not our fault) over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we’re pretty curious what happened. We need you to grab the blackbox from the ship and drop it off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This is a shipwreck by the way, so chances are some scavs will be around there too. But don’t worry, that’s been factored into your pay too.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_VE_Desc_001.tr:
Alguien que nos interesa murió recientemente (no fue culpa nuestra) en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y tenemos curiosidad por saber qué ocurrió. Necesitamos que recuperes la caja negra de la nave y la dejes en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Es un pecio, así que seguramente habrá carroñeros por allí. No te preocupes, eso también está contemplado en tu paga.

-Bit Zeros

blackbox_recover_desc_H_001.en:
Don’t know if you’ve heard, but there’s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? We’ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless you’re some crazy solo act, but we’d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros
blackbox_recover_desc_H_001.tr:
Don’t know if you’ve heard, but there’s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? We’ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless you’re some crazy solo act, but we’d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_H_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BR744152
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Contract’s come through to look into a recent attack near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Client claims that they were ambushed by a serious outlaw pack and need the proof. An operative with <EM4>significant combat experience</EM4> is needed to fly to scene and retrieve blackbox.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Find site of derelict ship at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the blackbox, and deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Expect heavy resistance from outlaws present on the scene. As such, this has been flagged as a <EM4>combat mission</EM4>.
Hockrow_BlackBox_space_H_Desc_001.tr:
Agencia Hockrow 
Caso #BR744152
Investigador principal: Arken Mallor

Resumen del caso: 
Ha llegado un contrato para investigar un ataque reciente cerca de <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. El cliente afirma que fueron emboscados por un grupo serio de forajidos y necesitan pruebas. Se requiere un operativo con <EM4>amplia experiencia en combate</EM4> para volar a la zona y recuperar la caja negra.

Acciones del investigador contratado:
Encontrar el lugar de la nave abandonada en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, asegurar la caja negra y entregarla en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Notas adicionales:
Espera fuerte resistencia por parte de los forajidos presentes en la zona. Por ello se ha marcado como una <EM4>misión de combate</EM4>.

BitZeros_blackbox_H_Desc_001.en:
Don’t know if you’ve heard, but there’s a bunch of ships over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> surrounding a burnt-out ship. You curious why? I know we are.
Think you can get in that wreck, grab the blackbox, and get out? We’ll pay you for it.

Based on the number of sketchy ships in the area, you should bring some friends with to watch your ass, unless you’re some crazy solo act, but we’d prefer if you actually survived this so you can drop off the blackbox at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for us. 

But hey, your call. As long as it gets done.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_blackbox_H_Desc_001.tr:
No sé si te has enterado, pero hay un montón de naves en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> rodeando una nave chamuscada. ¿Tienes curiosidad? Nosotros sí.

¿Crees que puedes entrar en ese casco, coger la caja negra y salir vivo? Te pagaremos por ello.

Por la cantidad de naves sospechosas en la zona, deberías llevar algunos amigos para cubrirte las espaldas, a menos que seas algún tipo de maníaco que va solo, aunque preferiríamos que sobrevivieras para entregar la caja negra en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Pero bueno, tú decides. Mientras se haga.

-Bit Zeros

recovery_desc.en:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch
recovery_desc.tr:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch

BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.en:
Managed to hunt down a rare piece of tech only for it to get snagged by someone right at the last second. Tracking it isn't exactly hard, but I'd rather not keeping chasing this thing.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and get it back for us. The people over there probably don't even know what it is, so let's do them a favor and take it off their hands. No idea if it's being guarded, so up to you how you wanna deal with any potential threats.

Once you've got it, take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and then we'll send over the creds.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.tr:
Conseguimos localizar una pieza tecnológica rara solo para que alguien nos la arrebatara en el último segundo. Rastrearla no es precisamente difícil, pero prefiero no seguir persiguiendo esto.

Ve a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y recupérala para nosotros. Probablemente la gente de allí ni siquiera sepa lo que es, así que hagámosles un favor y quitándosela de las manos. Ni idea de si está vigilada, así que queda en tus manos cómo quieras encargarte de cualquier posible amenaza.

Cuando la tengas, llévala a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> y entonces te enviaremos los créditos.

-Bit Zeros

BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.en:
If you're looking to make some primo creds then we've got a job for you. Someone stole a piece of tech from one of our transporters and is trying to sell it back to us.

The nullbrain didn't even realize we were tracing their comms when they comm'd us up trying to extort us. Now all you have to do is go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, grab the tech, and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. We don't know what the situation is over there so maybe bring a weapon or two with you. Could be fine though.

-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.tr:
Si quieres ganar unos créditos de primera, tenemos un trabajo para ti. Alguien robó una pieza tecnológica de uno de nuestros transportes e intenta vendérnosla de vuelta.

El descerebrado ni siquiera se dio cuenta de que estábamos rastreando sus comunicaciones cuando nos contactó para extorsionarnos. Ahora lo único que tienes que hacer es ir a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, coger la tecnología y llevarla a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. No sabemos cuál es la situación allí, así que quizá deberías llevar una o dos armas contigo. Aunque también podría no hacer falta.

-Bit Zeros

BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.en: We need someone to head over <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and find a piece of tech for us. You don't need to know what the tech is/who it belongs to/why we need it, all you have to do is take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll get you paid. There could be people protecting it, but that's kind of your problem.\n\n-Bit Zeros
BitZeros_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.tr: Necesitamos que alguien vaya a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y encuentre una pieza tecnológica para nosotros. No necesitas saber qué es la tecnología/de quién es/por qué la necesitamos; lo único que tienes que hacer es llevarla a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> y te pagaremos. Puede que haya gente protegiéndola, pero ese es más bien tu problema.\n\n-Bit Zeros

DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.en:
If you want something done right, you gotta do it yourself. That's what they say, right? Wish I had the time for that, but I have a business to run.

Some of our goods have been mislaid and I need a contractor to put this right for me. Got some info that the guys at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> ghosted one of my gang and got their hands on our gear. I need you to grab the stuff, deal with anyone at the location and take it to the drop-off at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me. Get it done and I'll sort out your payment.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_001.tr:
Si quieres que algo se haga bien, tienes que hacerlo tú mismo. Eso dicen, ¿no? Ojalá tuviera tiempo para eso, pero tengo un negocio que dirigir.

Parte de nuestra mercancía se ha extraviado y necesito un contratista que arregle este asunto por mí. Hemos conseguido información de que los tipos de <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> traicionaron a uno de los míos y se hicieron con nuestro equipo. Necesito que recuperes la mercancía, te ocupes de cualquiera que esté en el lugar y la lleves al punto de entrega en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Hazlo y me encargaré de tu pago.

-Twitch

DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.en:
Plan is to start expanding our operations in Nyx and step one is to control the supply line. If the other gangs in this system know what's good for them they'll stay out of our way.

Got word that one of our competitors is stashing some gear over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and I need you to grab it for me. When you're done, take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and don't be afraid to deal with anyone that gets in your way.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_002.tr:
El plan es empezar a expandir nuestras operaciones en Nyx y el primer paso es controlar la línea de suministro. Si las otras bandas de este sistema saben lo que les conviene, se mantendrán fuera de nuestro camino.

Hemos recibido información de que uno de nuestros competidores está almacenando mercancía en <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y necesito que la recuperes para mí. Cuando termines, llévala a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> y no dudes en encargarte de cualquiera que se interponga en tu camino.

-Twitch

DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.en:
One of my crew was supposed to be picking up some goods at a dead drop just outside Levski, but they ended up coming back to me with their tail between their legs empty handed.

Anyway, long story short, turns out it all got a bit messy and some other gang ended up getting a hold of our gear and taking it to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We can't afford to let perfectly good merchandise slip away like that, so you're gonna head over there and get it back for us. Once you've done that, take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get you paid.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverItem_Generic_Desc_003.tr:
Uno de los míos tenía que recoger una mercancía en un punto muerto cerca de Levski, pero acabó volviendo con el rabo entre las piernas y con las manos vacías.

En fin, resumiendo, la cosa se torció y otra banda terminó haciéndose con nuestro equipo y llevándoselo a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. No podemos permitir que una mercancía perfectamente válida se pierda así, así que vas a ir allí y recuperarla para nosotros. Cuando lo hayas hecho, llévala a <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> y te pagaré.

-Twitch

Headhunters_defend_XT_VH_desc_001.en:
XenoThreat are on the warpath right now. They’ve launched simultaneous attacks on several Headhunters sites and stretched our fighters thin. Got word they’re planning to storm [LOCATION] next, and we can’t get anyone there to defend it. 

I’m looking to pay someone to pull together a crew, gather supplies, and mount a strong defense for us. Gonna be honest with you, this is shaping up to be a hell of a fight. Xenos are sending some of their most experienced forces there. Not much else I can say except that they’ll probably stagger the arrival of their forces, wipe them all out and you’ll be paid handsomely. 

Think you can rise to the occasion?  

-Stows
Headhunters_defend_XT_VH_desc_001.tr:
Los XenoThreat están en plena guerra en este momento. Han lanzado ataques simultáneos en varios sitios de Headhunters y han estirado a nuestros luchadores. He oído que están planeando asaltar [LOCATION] a continuación, y no podemos conseguir a nadie allí para defenderlo.

Busco pagar a alguien para que reúna un equipo, recoja suministros y monte una fuerte defensa para nosotros. Sinceramente, esto se está perfilando como una gran pelea. Los Xenos están enviando algunas de sus fuerzas más experimentadas allí. No hay mucho más que pueda decir, excepto que probablemente escalen la llegada de sus fuerzas, elimínalos a todos y serás bien pagado.

¿Crees que puedes estar a la altura?

-Cambio

headhunters_bombingrun_M_CFP_desc_001.en:
I'm getting pretty bloody sick of Citizens for Prosperity sticking their noses where they don't belong. 

Started thinking that it might be pretty nice to ground their fleet for a little bit. We blow up their fuel tanks at [LOCATION] and those little pissheads won't be going nowhere quick.

Sound like your kinda thing?

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_M_CFP_desc_001.tr:
Estoy empezando a cansarme bastante de que Citizens for Prosperity meta las narices donde no les llaman.

He estado pensando que sería bastante agradable dejar su flota en tierra durante un tiempo. Volamos sus tanques de combustible en [LOCATION] y esos capullos no irán a ningún sitio rápidamente.

¿Te suena bien?

-Stows fuera

headhunters_bombingrun_H_XT_desc_001.en:
It seems that XenoThreat has gotten the same intel we did and are looking to pull off the same job as us. 

I want you to knock the competition out of the picture. Go to [LOCATION] and take out the fuel tanks they got there.

Then my people can finish up without worrying about XenoThreat crashing the party.

-Stows out
headhunters_bombingrun_H_XT_desc_001.tr:
Parece que XenoThreat ha conseguido la misma información que nosotros y están intentando realizar el mismo trabajo.

Quiero que saques a la competencia de la ecuación. Ve a [LOCATION] y destruye los tanques de combustible que tienen allí.

Luego mi gente podrá terminar el trabajo sin preocuparse de que XenoThreat arruine la fiesta.

-Stows fuera

northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_nocivs_des.en:
Hey, 

Got a contract for you that requires a bit more tactics than usual. A high-level criminal by the name [TARGET] is hiding with a large contingent of outlaws at [LOCATION]. 

Our intel suggests that [TARGET]’s forces most likely will act as defensive line in order to protect their boss. My best guess is that you will have to deal with them before you gain access to [TARGET].

That said, I don’t want you shooting indiscriminately. Sometimes these outlaws keep civilians around and they should be treated like non-combatants.

Best of luck,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_nocivs_des.tr:
Hola,

Tengo un contrato para ti que requiere un poco más de táctica de lo habitual. Un criminal de alto nivel llamado [TARGET] se está escondiendo con un gran contingente de forajidos en [LOCATION].

Nuestra inteligencia sugiere que las fuerzas de [TARGET] probablemente actuarán como una línea defensiva para proteger a su jefe. Mi mejor suposición es que tendrás que lidiar con ellos antes de obtener acceso a [TARGET].

Dicho esto, no quiero que dispares indiscriminadamente. A veces, estos forajidos tienen civiles a su alrededor y deben tratarse como no combatientes.

Buena suerte,

Braden Corchado
Oficial de Logística - Sucursal Stanton
Northrock Service Group

northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_desc_001.en:
Hey, 

Have an interesting bounty for you. A high level criminal by the name [TARGET] has been located at [LOCATION]. 

Based on our intel, its highly unlikely that the target’s going to be sitting and waiting out in the open. You most likely will have to infiltrate the facility and draw them out. 

Something like a large firefight should be enough to do the trick. 

Best of luck,

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group
northrock_bounty_fps_UGF_boss_desc_001.tr:
Hola,

Tengo una recompensa interesante para ti. Un criminal de alto nivel llamado [TARGET] ha sido localizado en [LOCATION].

Según nuestra inteligencia, es muy poco probable que el objetivo esté sentado y esperando al descubierto. Probablemente tendrás que infiltrarte en la instalación y atraerlo hacia afuera.

Algo como un gran tiroteo debería ser suficiente. 

Buena suerte,

Braden Corchado
Oficial de Logística - Sucursal Stanton
Northrock Service Group

headhunters_defendship_multi_HRT_PA_desc.en:
Sent ships to investigate a distress beacon only for it to turn into an ambush by the People’s Alliance. They’ve been fighting like hell to get away but can’t seem to extract themselves.

Let’s get ‘em some help on the double. Think you can go on over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to give ‘em some support?

-Stows
headhunters_defendship_multi_HRT_PA_desc.tr:
Enviamos naves a investigar una baliza de socorro y resultó ser una emboscada de la People’s Alliance. Han estado luchando como locos para escapar, pero no logran hacerlo.

Vamos a darles apoyo de inmediato. ¿Podrías dirigirte a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> y ofrecerles ayuda?

-Stows

TheCollector_Ships_Scorpius_Desc.en: Don't know what the name mean, but ship is very fast, very good in fight. With tweak, can better. You see list of what Wikelo need, go get and I make. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_Scorpius_Desc.tr: No sé qué significa el nombre, pero la nave es muy rápida y muy buena en combate. Con unos ajustes, puede ser aún mejor. Mira la lista de lo que Wikelo necesita, ve a buscarlo y yo la haré. Adiós.

Covalex_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.en:
Hi,

Here's the situation. After spending an hour on comms talking to the hauler, trying to help them diagnose what's wrong with their ship, it's been decided that we now need to get someone to head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and complete the delivery.

This is a pretty big one. You'll need a ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and unless you're super strong a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to shift it all.

I would really appreciate if we could just get this one done. Take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we can put this all behind us.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.tr:
Hola,

Esta es la situación. Después de pasar una hora en comunicaciones con el transportista intentando ayudarle a diagnosticar qué le ocurre a su nave, se ha decidido que necesitamos enviar a alguien a <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> para completar la entrega.

Este envío es bastante grande. Necesitarás una nave que pueda almacenar <EM4>[MAX_SCU] contenedores de carga</EM4> y, a menos que seas extremadamente fuerte, un <EM4>rayo tractor pesado</EM4> para moverlo todo.

Te agradecería mucho que pudiéramos resolver esto cuanto antes. Lleva la carga al elevador de carga en <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> y podremos dejar todo esto atrás.

[SIGN_OFF]

Ella Tieno 
Coordinadora júnior de logística 
Covalex Shipping   
'Lo que necesites, donde lo necesites.' 







Covalex Shipping es una corporación de responsabilidad limitada. Para fomentar las entregas puntuales y prevenir fraudes en los transportes de carga, Covalex Shipping establecerá un límite de tiempo de entrega y, una vez expirado, cualquier carga no entregada se considerará robada y será tratada como tal. El pago total se prorrateará según el porcentaje de carga entregada con éxito.

cfp_defend_regionshift_desc_001.en:
We've received a distress call from [LOCATION]. A group of unknown assailants have launched an attack. There have been multiple deaths reported and we need to reclaim the outpost.

I know this is far from your current position, but we're desperate to secure the area and get the outpost back and running again.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defend_regionshift_desc_001.tr:
Hemos recibido una llamada de emergencia de [LOCATION]. Un grupo de atacantes desconocidos ha lanzado un ataque. Se han reportado múltiples muertes y necesitamos recuperar el puesto de avanzada.

Sé que esto está lejos de tu posición actual, pero estamos desesperados por asegurar el área y hacer que el puesto de avanzada vuelva a funcionar.

Lima Endicott
Operador principal
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_VH.en:
Although Citizens for Prosperity is committed to change through non-violent means, it's become apparent that exceptions might have to be made. CFP safe zones near [LOCATION] were recently and violently taken by XenoThreat forces under the command of [TARGET].

We're looking for any available combat operatives to help take these outposts back. This will undoubtedly be a difficult endeavor as XenoThreat are highly trained and eager to fight, so you should prepare accordingly.

Aside from clearing each cluster of XenoThreat forces, you will need to take out [TARGET], who's loss will certainly make the system safer.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_XTAttack_VH.tr:
Aunque Citizens for Prosperity está comprometido con el cambio mediante medios no violentos, se ha vuelto evidente que pueden tener que hacerse excepciones. Las zonas seguras de CFP cerca de [LOCATION] fueron recientemente y violentamente tomadas por las fuerzas de los XenoThreat bajo el mando de [TARGET].

Estamos buscando operativos de combate disponibles para ayudar a recuperar estos puestos de avanzada. Esto sin duda será una tarea difícil, ya que los XenoThreat está altamente entrenado y ansioso por pelear, así que deberías prepararte en consecuencia.

Además de limpiar cada puesto de avanzada de las fuerzas de los XenoThreat, necesitarás eliminar a [TARGET], cuya pérdida sin duda hará que el sistema sea más seguro.

Buena suerte,

Lima Endicott
Operador Principal
Citizens for Prosperity

mg_miles_capturegang_desc_006.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ME-01

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Maltrox Arlington has been keeping a low profile recently, but we think he's come out of hiding. A patrol was refueling at a station when one of their ships was boosted. Maltrox is the most likely suspect. While the regtag was temporarily deactivated, we have been able to trace the ship’s quantum signature and have provided you those coordinates.

A third generation criminal, the Arlington gang has been under Maltrox’s leadership for the past six years. Be aware, this is a smart, aggressive, and very dangerous target. The more resources you can bring to bear, the more likely it is that we can bring Maltrox in one and for all. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
mg_miles_capturegang_desc_006.tr:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRATOS Y GESTIÓN

TIPO DE CONTRATO: Garantia de grupo
ESTADO DEL CONTRATISTA: Independiente
código de aprobacion: =[CONTRACTOR]

PARA PROCESAMIENTO INMEDIATO

*********
__Información de antecedentes__
Se ha emitido una orden de arresto grupal contra la famosa banda de secuestro de naves de Arlington despues de su reciente y descarado intento de robo de un Idris en un astillero de reparaciones. Mientras se detuvo el atraco, los miembros del grupo se dispersaron hacia el negro. A Eckhart Security se le ha concedido la recompensa por la captura inmediata de todos los pandilleros de alto nivel: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam 'Weepy' Arlington, Oslo Arlington y Les Arlington.
******** *

Maltrox Arlington ha mantenido un perfil bajo recientemente, pero creemos que ha salido de su escondite. Una patrulla estaba repostando combustible en una estación cuando uno de sus naves recibio un impulso. Maltrox es el sospechoso mas probable. Aunque la etiqueta de registro se desactivo temporalmente, hemos podido rastrear la firma cuantica de la nave y le hemos proporcionado esas coordenadas. 

, criminal de tercera generacion, la banda de Arlington ha estado bajo el liderazgo de Maltrox durante los ultimos seis años. Tenga en cuenta que se trata de un objetivo inteligente, agresivo y muy peligroso. Cuantos mas recursos pueda aportar, mas probable será que podamos incorporar Maltrox de una vez por todas. 

 Estas autorizado a utilizar cualquier fuerza que sea necesaria para neutralizar el objetivo. 

El pago se realizara al finalizar con éxito el contrato.

Este contrato no es negociable.

Este mensaje puede contener información confidencial, de propiedad exclusiva, privilegiada y/o privada. La información esta destinada a ser utilizada por la persona o entidad designada anteriormente.

*********

Two bank guards were reported missing last week. A few hours ago, their bodies turned up in a trash heap in Magnus with their biometrics stolen. Thankfully, a nearby dumpling cart had a security camera that captured the corpses being dropped. Facial recognition was able to ID one Kass Dent, romantic partner to Maltrox Arlington and parent of Les Arlington. Using the vid to construct a timeline, we have provided the coordinates of where Kass is currently believed to be hiding. 

Kass is suspected of a long list of murders, with these two only being the most recent. We recommend only bringing highly skilled wingman to try and keep the casualty count at a minimum.  

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

******** *

Dos guardías de banco fueron reportados como desaparecidos la semana pasada. Hace unas horas, sus cuerpos aparecieron en un monton de basura en Magnus con sus datos biometricos robados. Afortunadamente, un carrito de bolas de masa cercano tenia una camara de seguridad que capto los cadaveres que caian. El reconocimiento facial pudo identificar a Kass Dent, pareja romantica de Maltrox Arlington y padre de Les Arlington. Usando el video para construir una linea de tiempo, proporcionamos las coordenadas de donde se cree que se esconde actualmente Kass. 

Kass es sospechoso de una larga lista de asesinatos, siendo estos dos solo los mas recientes. Recomendamos traer unicamente un compañero altamente capacitado para intentar mantener el recuento de bajas al minimo.
